name: crispy-workflow
description: CRISPY framework plugin for structured AI-assisted development. Implements Clarify, Research, Intention, Structure, Plan, Yield phases with hidden sub-agent orchestration, two-stage review (spec + code), post-Yield TDD slice execution with RED/GREEN enforcement, git-worktree isolation, focused multi-repo workspaces, and a greenfield project workstream (@crispy-project).
